title: Marketing: Menu Tour (the rest of Marketing)

predicates.noError: !/Couldn.t load|Failed to fetch|Something went wrong|Not Found/i.test((document.title||'')+' '+(document.body.textContent||'').slice(0,240))
predicates.smartlinksLoaded: (()=>location.pathname.endsWith('/mkt-smartlinks.html')&&[...document.querySelectorAll('.a-metric')].some(e=>e.getBoundingClientRect().width>0)&&[...document.querySelectorAll('table thead th')].some(e=>/Name & Link/i.test(e.textContent||''))&&!/Couldn.t load|Failed to fetch|Not Found/i.test(document.title+' '+document.body.textContent.slice(0,200)))()

preflight.note: off-camera: the page loads sidebar-collapsed then JS applies the profile persisted preference (~1-2s later). Settle before the railToggle normalization so the unless-check + press act on the settled state (a blind early click can over-toggle an already-expanded sidebar and fail its sidebarExpanded postcondition).

off-camera: stage the persisted rail-panel preference expanded (washcentral rail toggle .wc-rail-panel-toggle, 'Hide panel' when open; probe-verified both directions July 11). The full Marketing sidebar must be visible for the whole tour. Skipped when already expanded.

ops.note: start page staged before capture: Marketing → Campaigns (mkt-campaigns.html), so the full Marketing sidebar is on screen
pre-roll: preflight staged the rail expanded; abort the take if collapsed
pre-roll: all sixteen Marketing rail links present (incl. Mobile Content Blocks + Push Campaigns), no error state
